title: Listening Basics Demo
instructions: Use this compact pack to test the player flow, mobile layout, and local audio playback.

questions.prompt: Why is it helpful to keep quiz audio clips short in a front-end-only web app?

choices.label: Short clips download and buffer more quickly on phones
GitHub Pages blocks audio above ten seconds
Long clips break local grading logic

questions.hint: Think about classroom Wi-Fi and mobile playback.
questions.explanation: Short clips reduce bandwidth and buffering pressure, which makes classroom playback more reliable across devices.

questions.prompt: Listen to the tone. Which description fits it best?
questions.hint: It sounds like a clean test tone rather than a complex recording.

media.title: Reference tone
media.caption: Short synthetic tone for testing playback.

questions.explanation: The clip is a pure tone, which makes it useful for quick listening checks in a lightweight demo pack.

questions.prompt: Which result output is most useful for a student who still needs to paste a score into another system?

choices.label: Only a hidden developer console log

questions.hint: The student may need a simple format they can paste elsewhere.
questions.explanation: Plain-text summaries fit the existing Google Form style workflow while keeping the front end simple.
